summary: Signal Sweep Blog Monitor — field_monitor bridge. New signal_sweep package: url_seeder seeds vendor.blog URLs into field_monitor, change_bridge reads content_hash changes (read-only), parser_templates defines generic blog content hash parser. Kill switches KILL_SIGNAL_SWEEP, KILL_BLOG_URL_SEED, KILL_FUNDING_DETECTION enforced. Sample gate LIMIT 100.

verification.read_only_bridge: change_bridge.py reads field_monitor tables only — never writes
verification.seed_module: url_seeder.py writes to field_monitor (seed operation only, with dry_run support)
verification.db_agent_status: DB_COMPLETE — vendor schema + vendor.blog created, seed ran 0 rows (table empty, data-dependent)
